companies.name: KWD Recycling

confidence.reason: Pricing retrieved directly from kwd.ie/page96.php — KWD is based in Killarney and primarily serves Kerry, West Cork and West Limerick.

companies.service_notes: Two plan options based on bin size. Fortnightly collection. Service and weight charge model — the less you weigh, the less you pay. Payment options: 12 months upfront, 6 months, or monthly Easy Pay direct debit.

plans.name: Option A (240L)
plans.household_size: Households with more than 2 people or higher waste volumes
plans.notes: Also available: €175/6 months or €340/year. Weight-based charges apply.

plans.name: Option B (140L)
plans.household_size: Households of 2 people or less / low waste volumes
plans.notes: Also available: €150/6 months or €290/year. Weight-based charges apply.

companies.name: Mr Binman

confidence.reason: Pricing retrieved directly from mrbinman.com/bin-collection-quote/. Kerry is a country (rural) area — country rates apply.

companies.service_notes: Bins collected on alternate weeks: Week 1 = Waste & Organic, Week 2 = Recycling & Glass. Kerry is country area — organic bin is 25L (not 140L city size). Glass caddy free. Text reminders provided.

plans.name: Household Standard
plans.notes: Introductory price €27/mo for first 6 months, then €33.52/mo.

plans.name: TerraUrban
plans.notes: €30 discount if paying by direct debit.

companies.name: Higgins Waste & Recycling Services Ltd

confidence.reason: Website unreachable (connection refused) at time of research. No pricing could be retrieved.

companies.service_notes: Kerry-based waste collector. Website may be temporarily down or no longer active.

confidence.reason: No website listed. Phone-only contact. No online pricing available.

companies.name: Kerry County Council

confidence.reason: Kerry County Council regulates waste collectors but does not directly provide household bin collection services. No collection pricing applicable.

companies.service_notes: Regulatory body only. Household waste collection in Kerry is provided by private operators.
